data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for reward types including credit, discount, free service, and cash. While the evidence confirms that Sarah receives a $25 account credit and her friend receives a 20% discount, there is no mention of free service or cash rewards in the provided use case. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage as not all specified reward types are accounted for.
gaps: No evidence of free service or cash rewards being offered.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
